Form.Name: ue_HIL_ConsolidatedMaterialPickListReportViewer
Form.Caption: Consolidated Job Material Pick List Report Viewer

Component.Name: flexLayout1_SITE
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1_SITE; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2_SITE; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3_SITE; VALUE: 9fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN0_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN4_SITE; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN5_SITE; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN6_SITE; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(6) TARGET(UNKNOWN0_SITE)

Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3_SITE; VALUE: 9fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(4) TARGET(UNKNOWN20)

Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3_SITE; VALUE: 9fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4_SITE; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5_SITE; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6_SITE; VALUE: 3fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7_SITE; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(8) TARGET(UNKNOWN21)

Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 4fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(8) TARGET(UNKNOWN21)

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 10; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(DisplayHeader) = 1; SECTYPE: ReportHeader; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageHeader) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN10; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(DisplayHeader) = 1; SECTYPE: ReportHeader; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN11; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(DisplayHeader) = 1; SECTYPE: ReportHeader; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN20; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(MatlLst132) <> 1 | #V(MatlLst132) <> 1; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ItmItem; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5_SITE; VALUE: 0.1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ItmItem) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN0_SITE; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ItmItem) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7_SITE; VALUE: 0.1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ItmItem) REGION8(ID: UNKNOWN21; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(MatlLst132) <> 1 | #V(MatlLst132) <> 1; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Item; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION9(ID: UNKNOWN6_SITE; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: ItmItem; BRKAFT: True) REGION10(ID: UNKNOWN49; VALUE: 2.6; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageFooter) REGION11(ID: UNKNOWN50; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: 1=2; VISINDESIGN: True) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: NavigationFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: PageFooterFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: End; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(10) TARGET(UNKNOWN49)

Component.Name: PageHeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 12; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: ReportCaptionStatic
Component.Caption: Consolidated Job Material Pick List Report
Component.EffectiveCaption: Consolidated Job Material Pick List Report

Component.Name: ReportHeader10FlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 15fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 14fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 14fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION8(ID: UNKNOWN8; VALUE: 0fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(3) TARGET(UNKNOWN11)

Component.Name: ReportHeader9FlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 16fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 20fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 0fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN10)

Component.Name: ReportHeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,1,0) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 10fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0.25,0) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 10fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0.25,0) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SLJobMatls( FILTERPERM(Job >= FV(StartJob) AND Job <= FV(EndJob)) ORDERBY(ItmItem, Item) RECORDCAP(20000) LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SLJobs( CA(VISOGRND) FILTERPERM(Job = FP(Job) AND Suffix = FP(Suffix) AND Job >= FV(StartJob) AND Job <= FV(EndJob)) RECORDCAP(0) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(StartJob),VAR V(EndJob),VAR V(StartSuffix),VAR V(EndSuffix),VAR V(JobStat),VAR V(StartItem),VAR V(EndItem),VAR V(StartProdMix),VAR V(EndProdMix),VAR V(StartJobDate),VAR V(EndJobDate),VAR V(StartOpera),VAR V(EndOpera),VAR V(MatlLst132),VAR V(MatlLstDate),VAR V(PickByLoc),VAR V(PrintSN),VAR V(PrintBCFmt),VAR V(PageOpera),VAR V(PrintSecLoc),VAR V(ExtScrapFact),VAR V(ReprintPick),VAR V(DisplayRefFields),VAR V(StartJobDateOffset),VAR V(EndJobDateOffset),VAR V(DisplayHeader),VAR V(BGSessio
